content.problemStatement:
In this task, you will create a static Morse code translator. Morse code is a method of encoding text characters as standardized sequences of two different signal durations, called dots and dashes. Your task is to implement a static method that can translate a given string of alphanumeric characters to Morse code.

The Morse code dictionary for alphanumeric characters is provided in the code. You need to implement a static method called `to_morse` that takes a string as input and returns the Morse code representation of that string.

For example, if the input is "HELLO 123", the output should be ".... . .-.. .-.. --- / .---- ..--- ...--"

Note:


The input string will contain only uppercase letters and numbers.
Words in the input string are separated by a single space.
In the Morse code output, use a forward slash (/) to separate words.
Use a single space to separate Morse code characters within a word.
